GHSA-9v82-vcjx-m76j - Properly escape active route params

2.0.12 5 May 2025

  • Fixed snippets in Administration

1.0.39 8 April 2025

  • Fixed a issue when the DocumentRoute does not exist, this happens in older Shopware versions like 6.4.7.0

3.0.8 8 April 2025

  • Added fix for NEXT-39918
  • Added fix for NEXT-40390
  • Improved fix for NEXT-37397

2.0.11 8 April 2025

  • Added fix for NEXT-39918

1.0.38 8 April 2025

  • Fixed compatibility between NEXT-34608 and core.loginRegistration.invalidateSessionOnLogOut (fix provided by Joshua Behrens)

1.0.37 30 September 2024

  • Fixed a missing class error with older Shopware versions like 6.4.1.0

1.0.36 26 September 2024

  • Fixed a problem during activation of the plugin NEXT-38376

  • Improve fix NEXT-37397
